description: DETAILED_DESCRIPTION — what problem this solves and high-level approach

codingStandards.documentation: Docstrings on all public functions and classes
codingStandards.errorHandling: Graceful error handling with logging — no bare except
codingStandards.naming: snake_case for Python, camelCase for JS/TS
codingStandards.testing: Unit tests for all business logic

stories.title: CLEAR_TITLE
stories.description: DETAILED_DESCRIPTION — what this story accomplishes, context Ralph needs
acceptanceCriteria: SPECIFIC — File X exists with function Y
TESTABLE — Endpoint /api/Z returns 200 with valid data

_template_notes.quality_gate: PRD must score >= 70/100 on pre-flight check to trigger Ralph
_template_notes.story_guidelines: Each story should be completable in one iteration. If a story is too large, split it.
_template_notes.acceptance_criteria: Every criterion must be objectively verifiable — no vague words like 'properly' or 'correctly'
_template_notes.dependencies: List story IDs this depends on. Ralph processes highest priority incomplete story first.
